summary: Completed frontend testing for 3DKPRINT e-commerce. All requested features verified working: Admin-to-public data sync via localStorage, stock +/- buttons in forms, 3D model upload section, cart persistence, and products showing as purchasable.
passed_tests: Admin login works with provided credentials
Admin /admin/produtos page loads correctly showing 9 products
Admin edit modal has stock +/- buttons (increment/decrement) working
Admin edit modal has 'MODELO 3D (OPCIONAL)' section with 'Carregar Modelo 3D' upload button
Admin price change saves to localStorage (admin_catalog_overrides)
Price change in admin syncs to public ProductDetails page in same session (R$ 4.360 → R$ 8.888)
Add New Product form has stock +/- buttons
Add New Product form has 'Modelo 3D (Opcional)' section with upload button
ProductDetails page shows products as purchasable (not 'Esgotado')
ProductDetails page 'Comprar Agora' and 'Adicionar ao Carrinho' buttons are enabled
All products have cart buttons, no 'Esgotado' badge showing incorrectly
Cart persistence: items save to localStorage ('3dkprint_cart')
Cart persistence: items persist after page reload
Cart persistence: items visible on /checkout after direct navigation
Toast notification 'Adicionado ao carrinho!' appears when adding items
Homepage loads correctly with navigation menu
critical_code_review_comments: productsData.ts applyAdminOverrides function correctly reads and applies localStorage overrides
CartContext uses lazy useState initialization - cart state properly hydrated from localStorage on initial render
Data sync is localStorage-based - works in same browser session only (expected behavior)
Products use inStock = product.active !== false - correctly showing products as purchasable
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 4→5 are working: (1) Admin price/stock changes sync to public site via localStorage overrides in productsData.ts, (2) Stock +/- buttons work in both Edit Modal and Add Product form, (3) Optional 3D model upload section exists in both forms, (4) Cart persistence fixed from iteration 3 continues to work, (5) All products show as purchasable. Data sync is localStorage-based within same browser session.

admin_to_public_price_sync.details: Changed Elegoo Centauri Carbon price from R$ 4.360 to R$ 8.888 in admin, verified on public product page

modelo_3d_opcional_upload.details: Section present with 'Carregar Modelo 3D' button in both Edit Modal and Add Form

products_purchasable.details: Products show with enabled 'Comprar Agora' and 'Adicionar ao Carrinho' buttons, stock shown as '(X disponíveis)'

cart_persistence.details: Items persist in localStorage after reload and direct /checkout navigation
